blocks.text: La Liga title day: Real Madrid go first, Barcelona answer tonight
Real Madrid sit 4 points behind Barcelona. Win at Son Moix and the gap is one — then Atlético kick off against Barça at 21:00 with the title race on a knife's edge.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League Quarterfinals
